_codex_staging.notes: JPMorgan Chase transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official JPMorgan Chase quarterly earnings materials include earnings transcript PDFs; structured StockAnalysis rows are included as readable transcript fallbacks pending direct PDF mapping.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.primary_structured_source: StockAnalysis transcript pages with official JPMorgan Chase PDF context
coverage_summary.official_source_context: JPMorgan Chase quarterly earnings transcript PDFs; StockAnalysis structured fallback
